# Transcript
LIA CAL*A H
GEGRAPTAI AP
KWMA PROS TA M
S AN FRAZEI O
AGRAFEAS KA
N PLHN LIQW
LO O TI AN KELE
TELOS ECON APO
RAFHN EIS TO
MACOY A
